subject: use encrypted auth for dmaap
commit_message:
use encrypted auth for dmaap

Re-Factor DMAAP Credentials to use encrypted auth credential

Change-Id: I236cbeb71887e636b0378bceb43fbb8a981b5c31
Issue-ID: SO-1425
Signed-off-by: Bonkur, Venkat (vb8416) <vb8416@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1594/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/1594

Patch Set 1:

I looked at the Jira and it remains unclear what is this for?  I get that its some encrypted credential, but where is it used?  Is there some complementary change to a helm chart that needs to be made (to reference this new var)?  If so, does component chart owner need to make this change, or is it in some common chart?
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman

Patch Set 1:
